not_promoted.bootstrap_replicate_alignments: Not retained in publication data; regenerated by the workflow when needed.
not_promoted.per_replicate_iqtree_artifacts: Not retained in publication data; inference details are log/provenance, not publication-facing result files.

ordering_semantics.bootstrap_replicate_id: RAxML replicate alignment ID, e.g. BS183 means bootstrap.BS183.
ordering_semantics.bootstrap_replicate_index_zero_based: Zero-based replicate index from the generated RAxML bootstrap alignment filename.
ordering_semantics.composition_distance_to_source_alignment: Euclidean distance between source-alignment and replicate-alignment composition vectors over A,C,G,T,AmbiguousOrGap.
ordering_semantics.display_order: 1-based visual/order position in the promoted Phylo-Movies tree sequence.
ordering_semantics.ranked_newick_line: 1-based line number in the matching all_trees Newick file.
ordering_semantics.sort_key: Field used to sort bootstrap replicates into the promoted order.
ordering_semantics.source_replicate_alignment_file: Original generated bootstrap alignment filename in the staging run.
